params.name: Arthur's Roundtable
params.description:
On Jan 27, 500 AD, Arthur obtained the strongest shield of his life.
Arthur always had meetings with the knights around a long table. Whenever somebody spoke, the one on the far side of the table would feel insulted. Finally, one day, Arthur's wife, Queen Guinevere came up with the idea of using an old round table for meetings. This way, the sense of hierarchy disappeared, and the problem was resolved. Hence, later generations address them as the Knights of the Round Table. The round table be …
